results.title: Shipping Schedule: Week Starting June 6
results.description: The Department of Marine & Ports Services has released the weekly shipping schedule for ship arrivals commencing on Saturday, June 6th. On Saturday the Independence of the Seas and the Norwegian Jewel cruise ships and the Belle-Poule ship are expected, on Sunday the Oleander container ship will arrive, and on Monday the Norwegian Aqua and [...]
